# Workflow Status Badges

Add these badges to your README.md to show the status of your workflows:

```markdown
[![Build and Release](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml)
[![Test Build](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/test-build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/test-build.yml)
[![Deploy Website](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/deploy-website.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/deploy-website.yml)
```

## Individual Platform Badges

```markdown
[![macOS Build](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml/badge.svg?branch=main&label=macOS)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml)
[![Windows Build](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml/badge.svg?branch=main&label=Windows)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml)
[![Linux Build](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml/badge.svg?branch=main&label=Linux)](https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions/workflows/build-and-release.yml)
```

## Custom Badge URLs

Replace `OpenCortexIDE/cortexide` with your actual repository path:

- **Repository**: `https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide`
- **Actions**: `https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/actions`
- **Releases**: `https://github.com/OpenCortexIDE/cortexide/releases`
